note: With estar: estoy cansado. Female form: cansada.
With estar: estoy feliz. Same form for all genders.
With estar: estoy ocupado. Female form: ocupada.
With estar: estoy aburrido. Female form: aburrida.
With estar: estoy enfermo. Female form: enferma.
Spanish uses tener (to have) for physical needs: tengo hambre = I am hungry.
Spanish uses tener (to have) for physical needs: tengo sed = I am thirsty.
Spanish uses tener (to have) for physical needs: tengo frio = I am cold.
Spanish uses tener (to have) for physical needs: tengo calor = I am hot.
